items.title: Keiko Fujimori declared winner of Peru's presidential election weeks after vote
items.dek: The daughter of disgraced president Alberto Fujimori is declared winner of tight race nearly a month after voting took place.
items.body: The daughter of disgraced president Alberto Fujimori is declared winner of tight race nearly a month after voting took place.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: How Messi, Argentina saved themselves from humilia...
items.dek: No one could've predicted Argentina would nearly be bounced from the World Cup by Cape Verde, but the round of 32 gave us an instant classic.
items.body: No one could've predicted Argentina would nearly be bounced from the World Cup by Cape Verde, but the round of 32 gave us an instant classic.
